reviews.review_description:
This isn’t easy, walking on stilts. 
Even the first level I had to try several times. 

But it is fun and very challenging.

Keep Balance And Carry On is an original, fun, and truly quirky VR game that transforms a mundane action into a real challenge. Its increasing difficulty, chaotic physics, and humor make each level a small, unpredictable adventure.
Perfect for those who love to laugh, take on challenges, and show off their most… clumsy moments!
